scripts.dev: npm run build -w @gaem/shared && concurrently -n shared,server,client -c gray,blue,green "npm run dev -w @gaem/shared" "npm run dev -w @gaem/server" "npm run dev -w @gaem/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @gaem/shared && npm run build -w @gaem/server && npm run build -w @gaem/client
scripts.dev:cf: npm run build -w @gaem/shared && npm run build -w @gaem/client && npm run sync-maps:local -w @gaem/cf-worker && concurrently -n shared,client,cf -c gray,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @gaem/shared" "npm run dev:cf -w @gaem/client" "npm run dev -w @gaem/cf-worker"
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build -w @gaem/shared && npm run build -w @gaem/client && npm run sync-maps -w @gaem/cf-worker && npm run deploy -w @gaem/cf-worker
